Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $35,922,978Details

Worldwide Box Office $70,022,978
Domestic Physical Disc Sales

Total $8,628,380

Movie Details

Video Release: June 23rd, 2009 by MGM Video

Running Time: 92 minutes
